title: Is it possible to cut down Eva in 15 2hrs
display_title: Is it possible to cut down Eva in 15 2hrs
wikitext:
[]: Is it possible to cut down Eva in 1.5-2hrs?             Quote Post by FrDougal9000 » Fri May 31, 2013 12:36 pm While I've never actually fully seen Death , I thought that the idea around it was genuinely intriguing; what it basically tried to do was cut down 24 episodes (or 8 hours) worth of story into an hour long film (it's not 70 minutes; the last 10 mins were the credits and intermission sequence). And I've been wondering as to whether or not it's actually possible to cut down the plot of Evangelion 1-24 within the space of 90 minutes, maybe 2 hours. So I figured I might as well ask you guys and see your thoughts on the subject. Personally, I'd love to give a shot and see if it's actually possible but I wanna hear your opinions on the matter too. If you do reply, thanks and have a good day!

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Fri May 31, 2013 1:00 pm Well, they tried to cut down Episodes 1-6 into Rebuild of Evangelion 1.0, and they had to lose some scenes although the bulk of it remained intact. If you try compressing the entire series, though, it might lose some valuable material because you'd have to choose between keeping some scenes which set the tone or contain infodumps or are just interesting from a psychological point of view, as well as action scenes. Still, Death proves that it can be done to some extent.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Fri May 31, 2013 1:08 pm Is it possible to cut down the relevant plot points of the series into 2-3 hours? Probably, yeah. But you'll end up butchering the message in the process. Sure, there may be some superfluous bits here and there, but the rest is important to understanding the motivations of each character.

[]:             Quote Post by Dream » Sun Jun 02, 2013 10:45 pm I think it is very possible to condense NGE into 2-3 hours. However, you'll need to be extremely good at condensing this information, chose a particular aspect/layer of the series you want to focus on, and accept the fact there's a lot you'll have to cut. If you want to showcase an specific aspect of the series, then it might be possible.

Article: Is it possible to cut down Eva in 15 2hrs
 condense NGE into 2-3 hours. However, you'll need to be extremely good at condensing this information, chose a particular aspect/layer of the series you want to focus on, and accept the fact there's a lot you'll have to cut. If you want to showcase an specific aspect of the series, then it might be possible.
